nasb.text: They slice off what is on the right hand but still are hungry, And they eat what is on the left hand but they are not satisfied; Each of them eats the flesh of his own arm.

esv.text: They slice meat on the right, but are still hungry, and they devour on the left, but are not satisfied; each devours the flesh of his own arm,

cnv.text: 有人在右邊切肉，仍然飢餓； 在左邊吞吃，仍然不飽足； 各人竟吃自己手臂的肉。

ccb.text: 他们到处抢夺食物， 仍饥饿难忍， 甚至吃自己的骨肉。

csbs.text: 他们在右边割肉，还是饥饿； 在左边吞噬，仍不饱足； 各人竟吞噬自己膀臂的肉。
